changes_made: Changed k8s_service_mesh_mtls_enabled to k8s_service_mtls_enabled for consistency with resource naming conventions
review_notes: The functions generally map well to Kubernetes security controls related to internal system connections. The naming is mostly consistent with the pattern, but a minor change was made for consistency in resource naming. The functions are technically accurate and relevant to the control.
naming_improvements: Use 'service' instead of 'service_mesh' for resource name to align with existing naming conventions
title: CCCS CA-9: Internal System Connections
step1_reasoning: The control CCCS CA-9 focuses on securing internal system connections, which in Kubernetes can be addressed through network policies to restrict internal traffic, ensuring TLS is enabled for ingress traffic, using mutual TLS (mTLS) in service meshes for secure service-to-service communication, and ensuring API server communications are encrypted with TLS.
